module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string execution invocation input guidance, and Initial input rendering that keeps System separate from previous-task Context.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates; Initial declares System on its own input line and uses {{#IF condition | accepted | rejected}} only for previous-task Context.
